caption: A man with glasses and a large, grey, pointed wig sits in a studio setting, wearing a white long-sleeved shirt, a red bow tie, and light-colored suspenders. He wears black over-ear headphones and speaks into a black microphone positioned in front of him. The background features a wall with framed photos and clothing displays, including shirts and a "LEE" brand tag. On-screen logos appear in the lower left and right corners of the scene; the left logo reads "BOSS TALK JOY PODCAST" and the right logo reads "BOSS TALK JOY PODCAST". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a seated position, slightly shifting his head and facial expression as he talks, while the camera angle and environmental elements remain stationary.
